# Delivery Plan

**Created:** 2026-03-16
**Total Phases:** 8

## Summary
14 features with builder TODO status, including 7 full-scope changes and a HIGH-complexity feature (pl_update_purlin with 10 new scenarios). Phased delivery respects the full transitive dependency graph across 4 layers (anchors -> policies/modals -> dashboard config -> integration tests). pl_update_purlin is fully independent and parallelizable with early phases.
